description: Canonical parameter dictionary for discrete power and small-signal MOSFETs, covering enhancement-mode N-channel and P-channel silicon devices as well as SiC and GaN power FETs. Demonstrates that the datasheet schema is family-agnostic: the same measurement envelope, condition model, and provenance serve a discrete transistor as well as a linear regulator. Condition axes for this family include V_GS, V_DS, I_D, I_S, I_G, DI_DT, T_J, T_C, and T_SP; the Kelvin/driver-source pin uses function KS. Version 1.1 adds transconductance (unit S), the output/switching charge and effective-Coss / switching-energy family (Qoss, Qg(th), Qsw, Eon, Eoff, Eoss, Coss(er/tr)), body-diode forward current and peak reverse-recovery current, drain-gate and pulsed gate-source ratings, lumped turn-on/off times, and junction-to-board thermal resistance; and corrects the source-drain (diode_forward_voltage) semantics so it does not assert an intrinsic body diode on GaN parts. Aliases normalize the printed datasheet symbols.

parameters.name: Drain-source voltage
parameters.hint: The absolute-maximum drain-to-source voltage, the headline voltage rating. Store as absolute_max. The breakdown voltage V(BR)DSS is the characterized counterpart.

parameters.name: Gate-source voltage
parameters.hint: Maximum gate-source voltage, typically a symmetric limit such as +/-20 V. Store as absolute_max, using min and max in the value.

parameters.name: Continuous drain current
parameters.hint: Continuous drain current, strongly case-temperature dependent, so specify T_C (often 25 degC and 100 degC). May be package-limited below the silicon capability.

parameters.name: Pulsed drain current
parameters.hint: Peak pulsed drain current, pulse width and duty cycle limited.

parameters.name: Single-pulse avalanche energy
parameters.hint: Single-pulse avalanche energy, specified with the test inductance and starting current.

parameters.name: Power dissipation
parameters.hint: Maximum power dissipation, derated with case temperature.

parameters.name: Gate threshold voltage
parameters.hint: Gate-source threshold, measured at a small drain current with VDS = VGS. Give min, typ, max where published, with the I_D and T_J conditions.

parameters.name: Static drain-source on-resistance
parameters.hint: On-resistance, strongly gate-drive dependent, so emit one entry per V_GS point (for example 10 V and 4.5 V), each with its I_D and T_J conditions. This is the defining figure of merit for a switching MOSFET.

parameters.name: Zero-gate-voltage drain current
parameters.hint: Drain leakage at VGS = 0 and VDS at or near the rating, at stated T_J.

parameters.name: Gate-source leakage current
parameters.hint: Gate leakage at maximum VGS with VDS = 0. Often a symmetric +/- bound.

parameters.name: Input capacitance
parameters.hint: Ciss = Cgs + Cgd, measured at a stated VDS, VGS = 0, and test frequency.

parameters.name: Output capacitance
parameters.hint: Coss = Cds + Cgd, at a stated VDS.

parameters.name: Reverse transfer capacitance
parameters.hint: Crss = Cgd, the Miller capacitance that governs switching speed.

parameters.name: Total gate charge
parameters.hint: Total gate charge, at stated VDS, I_D, and drive VGS. Store in coulombs (a 10 nC figure is 1e-8 C).

parameters.name: Turn-on delay time
parameters.hint: Resistive-load switching times are specified together at one VDS, I_D, VGS, and Rg. Store in seconds (a 7 ns figure is 7e-9 s).

parameters.name: Source-drain (reverse-conduction) voltage
parameters.hint: The source-to-drain voltage in reverse conduction at a stated current and T_J. For a silicon or SiC MOSFET this is the intrinsic body-diode forward voltage. A GaN FET has NO intrinsic body diode: reverse conduction is through the channel and is gate-voltage dependent, so give the gate condition (a more negative V_GS raises VSD) and expect reverse_recovery_charge = 0. Do not assume a body diode exists for every part in this family.

parameters.name: Thermal resistance, junction to case
parameters.hint: Junction-to-case thermal resistance. The unit is degC/W, equivalently K/W.

parameters.name: Thermal resistance, junction to ambient
parameters.hint: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance, board and copper-area dependent, so record the stated mounting condition in the measurement conditions.

parameters.name: Operating junction temperature range
parameters.hint: Recommended operating junction temperature range. Store as recommended, with min and max in the value.

parameters.name: Storage temperature range
parameters.hint: Absolute-maximum storage temperature range.

parameters.name: Forward transconductance
parameters.hint: Forward transconductance dID/dVGS at a stated VDS and ID, in siemens (A/V). A 280 mS value is 0.28 S.

parameters.name: Output charge
parameters.hint: Charge stored in the output capacitance Coss when VDS swings to the rated voltage. A headline hard-switching loss figure. Store the charge (C); a 213 nC value is 2.13e-07.

parameters.name: Gate charge at threshold
parameters.hint: Gate charge delivered to reach the gate threshold voltage.

parameters.name: Switching charge
parameters.hint: Gate charge from threshold through the Miller plateau, the charge that dominates the switching transition.

parameters.name: Gate plateau (Miller) voltage
parameters.hint: The gate-source Miller-plateau voltage at a stated ID, distinct from the gate threshold. Drives gate-drive and dead-time design.

parameters.name: Turn-on switching energy
parameters.hint: Energy dissipated per turn-on transition at a stated VDS, ID, and gate drive. The dominant loss metric for hard-switched SiC and Si parts.

parameters.name: Turn-off switching energy
parameters.hint: Energy dissipated per turn-off transition at a stated VDS, ID, and gate drive.

parameters.name: Output-capacitance stored energy
parameters.hint: Energy stored in Coss at the rated VDS, the soft-switching loss figure of merit.

parameters.name: Effective output capacitance, energy-related
parameters.hint: The fixed capacitance that stores the same energy as the nonlinear Coss over a 0-to-rated VDS swing. Distinct from the small-signal Coss.

parameters.name: Effective output capacitance, time-related
parameters.hint: The fixed capacitance that gives the same charging time as the nonlinear Coss over a 0-to-rated VDS swing.

parameters.name: Source-drain (body-diode) forward current
parameters.hint: Continuous (and, as a second measurement, pulsed) reverse/third-quadrant current rating of the source-drain path or body diode. Present even on GaN parts, which conduct in reverse through the channel.

parameters.name: Peak reverse-recovery current
parameters.hint: Peak body-diode reverse-recovery current, specified with a di/dt condition (axis DI_DT, unit A/us). Zero/not-applicable for GaN.

parameters.name: Drain-gate voltage
parameters.hint: Absolute-maximum drain-to-gate voltage at a stated gate-source resistance, distinct from VDS and VGS. Common on small-signal parts.

parameters.name: Pulsed gate-source voltage
parameters.hint: Peak/transient gate-source voltage rating, distinct from the continuous gate_source_voltage. Store as absolute_max with min and max.

parameters.name: Turn-on time
parameters.hint: Lumped turn-on time, when a part specifies it instead of the separate turn_on_delay_time and rise_time (common on small-signal MOSFETs).

parameters.name: Turn-off time
parameters.hint: Lumped turn-off time, when a part specifies it instead of the separate turn_off_delay_time and fall_time.

parameters.name: Junction-to-board thermal resistance
parameters.hint: Thermal resistance from junction to board (or solder point for a leaded SMD package), a primary heat path for dual-side-cooled and leadless parts.
